data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimize decision time by limiting choices for users.

data.title: Fitt’s Law
data.description: Design efficient paths to frequently used elements.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Present information in chunks to enhance recall.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Utilize visual cues to guide user perceptions and actions.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Optimize for beauty to create perceived ease-of-use.
